blockers: hydrologic_study_pending — stream proximity requires setback analysis and possible retention basin — estimated 6 weeks

topographic_survey.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours. Particularly important for this 15,000sqm site with steep slope on the west side.

hydrologic_study.rationale: Required due to stream running through the northeast corner. Stream proximity requires setback analysis and possible retention basin design per BCS environmental regulations.
